title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1677 - Procedure to register child support order of foreign country for modification
text:
454.1677.  Procedure to register child support order of foreign country for modification. — A party or support enforcement agency seeking to modify, or to modify and enforce, a foreign child support order not under the Convention may register that order in this state under sections 454.1632 to 454.1653 if the order has not been registered.  A petition for modification may be filed at the same time as a request for registration, or at another time.  The petition must specify the grounds for modification.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
